channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Comments Spark Stock Market Losses; Elon Musk-Led SpaceX, Tesla Tumble
item.description: Dow Jones Futures: Trump sparked losses Monday after he said Iran "will pay" for killing American soldiers. SpaceX and Tesla sold off.

item.title: Elon Musk sends first warning to SpaceX short sellers
item.description: In a pointed message on X, Elon Musk warned that firms maintaining significant short positions in SpaceX over time face “very low” survival probability. The statement comes amid post-IPO volatility for the rocket company, now trading under the ticker $SPCX . The survival probability of firms who ...

item.title: Tesla puts Starlink antenna in Cybercab
item.description: Tesla and Starlink say SpaceX’s satellite internet is now “directly integrated” into the Cybercab, Tesla’s dedicated robotaxi. The reveal came through a pair of posts on X on Monday, with a cutaway diagram showing a Starlink antenna sitting in the vehicle’s roof. Neither company explained why a c...

item.title: Elon Musk Says AI and Robots Will Do ‘So Much Stuff’ We Run Out of Things for Humans to Do — But ‘We’ll Basically Just Issue Money to People’
item.description: The biggest workplace debate of the next decade might not be about asking for a raise. It could be figuring out what to do when the robots have already finished the job. That’s the future Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon...

item.title: Buy Tesla Stock Before Q2 Earnings, or Wait for the Results?
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is set to report Q2 results after the closing bell on Wednesday, July 22, with investors hoping the EV leader can build on a surprisingly strong delivery report.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Faces A New Fremont Neighbor As Agility Opens Robot Training Center
item.description: Agility Robotics has opened a humanoid robot training center near Tesla's upcoming Optimus factory in Fremont. The facility sits next to the planned Tesla Optimus site, highlighting growing activity in humanoid robotics for industrial use. The development spotlights potential competition and coll...

item.title: Strong earnings growth needed to justify tech valuations, says expert
item.description: STORY: Citing Alphabet's Google and Elon Musk's Tesla as examples, Brown said that "to justify the high valuations that we see in a lot of those names, we would need to see good earnings growth, not just kind of your run-of-the-mill 10%, but you'd want to see higher earnings growth on top of good...

item.title: Starlink Mini V2 Enters Production With Built-in Battery
item.description: Starlink Mini V2 Enters Production With Built-in Battery

item.title: Tesla ‘Full Self-Driving’ got me a speeding ticket, and Tesla killed the fix
item.description: I got a speeding ticket this weekend while using Tesla’s Full Self-Driving. The car was driving itself in Standard mode on FSD when it took me up to 78 km/h in a 50 km/h zone. A police officer coming the other way clocked me on radar and pulled me over on the spot.

item.title: Tesla VP: Updated Version of FSD V14 Lite Likely Going Wide
item.description: Tesla VP: Updated Version of FSD V14 Lite Likely Going Wide

item.title: Tesla reveals first vehicle model to receive Starlink integration
item.description: Tesla has evidently revealed which of its vehicle models will be the first to receive Starlink integration: the Cybercab. Tesla’s Santana Row showroom now has a full-fledged display of the Cybercab , with an extensive bit of information hung around an exhibit that seems to reveal the vehicle’s ne...

item.title: Tesla Is Still Down 17% in 2026. Can Wednesday’s Earnings Event Get TSLA Stock Back on Track?
item.description: Tesla heads into Wednesday's Q2 earnings report with a 17% year-to-date loss and a valuation that assumes autonomy will eventually justify everything. Whether this week's call rebuilds confidence or deepens the skepticism depends on a few critical numbers Wall Street is watching closely.

item.title: Tech Faces a Moment of Truth as Earnings Test the Rally
item.description: Tesla, Alphabet, IBM, Texas Instruments, and Intel headline a pivotal earnings week as weakening technical signals suggest the tech rally may need time to consolidate.

item.title: Wall Street Eager For Robotaxi, Optimus News During Tesla Earnings
item.description: Earnings may take a back seat again. Investors want updates about Tesla's robotaxis and Optimus robots.

item.title: Tesla Earnings: Investors 'Increasingly Focused' On Robotaxi, Optimus Spending
item.description: Ahead of second-quarter earnings, analysts want to see if Elon Musk's investments in robotaxis and Optimus robots start to pay off.

item.title: Options Traders Bet $550M Against Tesla Ahead of Earnings
item.description: With Tesla's earnings days away, options desks are flashing an unusually bearish signal, and a credible new rival is arriving just in time to complicate the story for bulls still betting on the Elon Musk premium.

item.title: Tesla Starts Rolling Out New Version of FSD v14 Lite With New Features
item.description: Tesla Starts Rolling Out New Version of FSD v14 Lite With New Features

item.title: Ford’s new EV pickup caught at a Tesla Supercharger
item.description: Ford’s upcoming midsize electric pickup will start at around $30,000 with a native NACS port to recharge at Tesla Superchargers.

item.title: Reshoring Global Wealth: The Macro Case For Tesla Optimus
DATAMYTE Achieves ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Certification for Digital Clipboard, Its No-Code Manufacturing Workflow Platform
item.description: ASI DATAMYTE, Inc. ("DATAMYTE"), a leading provider of production and quality management solutions serving over 1000 manufacturers including Ford, Boston Scientific, Northrop Grumman, CS Wind, Stellantis, Boeing, Tesla, Gillette, Borg Warner, Cabinetworks Group, Foxconn, Pepsico, GM, and more, an...

item.title: Musk Denies Report of $52 Billion AI Server Order
item.description: The SpaceX CEO called claims of a massive Nvidia server purchase "fake news."

item.title: This Analyst Bets On Tesla’s Robotaxi And Cybercab Businesses Ahead Of Q2 Results – Retail Sees Stock Climbing To $450
item.description: Cantor Fitzgerald said Tesla’s Robotaxi business and upcoming Cybercab platform represent a high-margin software-as-a-service opportunity, according to a report by CNBC.

item.title: Tesla Plans 20% Production Increase at Berlin Plant
item.description: The company is preparing to raise output as European demand for the Model Y improves.

item.title: SpaceX adjusts Starship Flight 13 test launch target date once again
item.description: SpaceX has updated its target for the thirteenth integrated flight test of Starship, aiming for as early as Thursday, July 23. The 90-minute launch window opens at 5:45 p.m. CT from the company’s Starbase facility in South Texas.

item.title: Tesla earnings preview: Wall Street awaits Q2 results
item.description: Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian joins Julie Hyman on Market Catalysts to preview Tesla (TSLA) earnings report as Wall Street expects the EV maker to beat modest second-quarter vehicle sales and provide clues about the EV maker's outlook.

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises After 20% Berlin Factory Production Boost Plan
item.description: Tesla Eyes 375,000 Vehicles a Year From Germany in Production Push

item.title: Elon Musk debunks $52 billion SpaceX-NVIDIA GPU deal
item.description: Elon Musk dismissed reports claiming SpaceX had placed a massive order for NVIDIA GPUs worth $52 billion. The denial came hours after Taiwanese media, citing unnamed industry sources, reported that SpaceX planned to acquire approximately 13,000 AI server racks, equating to roughly 1 million GB300...

item.title: Tesla at $380: Wall Street Says It’s a Buy But Here’s 3 Strong Reasons to Sell
item.description: Wall Street's Buy consensus and a $460 price target sound convincing until you look at what is actually driving Tesla's margin recovery and what prediction markets are saying about the growth story holding that valuation together.

item.title: Tesla earnings review: 2 key things to watch
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) reports earnings this week. Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi is joined by Yahoo Finance Markets & Data Editor Jared Blikre and Senior Reporter Ines Ferré to break down how the EV maker has performed and the two key issues investors will be watching in the company's latest e...

item.title: Elon Musk sheds details on Tesla FSD’s upcoming improvements
item.description: Elon Musk shed more details on the upcoming improvements to Tesla’s Full Self-Driving suite, specifically one that the CEO mentioned last week, which should help owners see fewer interventions. Last week, Musk hinted that one major improvement that Tesla planned to roll out to Full Self-Driving u...

item.title: Florida AG asks court to erase Tesla’s $243M Autopilot crash verdict
item.description: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier is asking a federal appeals court to wipe out the $243 million verdict a Miami jury handed Tesla over a fatal Autopilot crash. The attorneys general of Alabama and Georgia joined the July 9 brief, which asks the 11th Circuit to throw out the judgment entire...

item.title: Tesla: Q2 Earnings Need To Justify The AI Premium
What it will take for Big Tech to wow investors this earnings season
item.description: US stock futures (ES=F, NQ=F, YM=F) got a lift in Monday's pre-market trading, coming off of last week's chip sell-off as investors await to hear earnings results from Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Tesla (TSLA), Intel (INTC), and IBM (IBM) this week. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman is joined by Yahoo Fi...

item.title: Tesla Q2 Earnings Preview: What To Expect From Upcoming Report
item.description: Tesla Earnings Are Coming. Wall Street Wants More Than a Delivery Beat

item.title: Tesla remote operator crashed a ‘Robotaxi’ in Houston, NHTSA data shows
item.description: Tesla has filed four new “Robotaxi” crash reports with NHTSA, and the most revealing one involves a Tesla remote operator driving the vehicle into a tree stump in Houston. It’s the third crash Tesla has now reported involving a human operating the car remotely caused the collision — and the first...

item.title: Tesla Stock And The Price Of Its Ambition
item.description: The company is making a colossal bet on its future, and one number reveals the immediate cost to investors.

item.title: Musk Says Tesla’s Will Remember How You Drive. Why That Matters for the Stock.
item.description: Tesla reports second quarter earnings on Wednesday and Elon Musk is teasing more technology improvements.

item.title: Stocks Need Some Tech Magic to Kickstart Market Rally
item.description: Gas prices top $4 a gallon again, Nike loses the World Cup, SpaceX eyes data center deal, and more news to start your day.

item.title: America’s Debt Just Shattered a WWII Record. Elon Musk Says Only One Thing Can Save Us.
item.description: Federal debt just crossed a threshold not seen since soldiers were coming home from World War II, and the math shows spending cuts cannot close the gap. Elon Musk says only one force in the world is large enough to prevent national bankruptcy.

item.title: New 2026.20.6 FSD v14 Lite build brings more HW4 features: Streaks, improved arrival options, and disable brake to confirm
item.description: submitted by /u/Forsaken-Topic-7216 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla increases profit in Germany despite lower production
item.description: Tesla concluded the 2025 fiscal year at its Grünheide plant in Germany with higher profits despite declining production and revenue. At the same time, the US electric car manufacturer is preparing a significant production ramp-up at the plant and continues to expand the site with its own battery ...

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Releases Wall Street Estimates Ahead of Q2 Earnings: Here's What Analysts Expect
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) released its company-compiled data of sell-side analysts’ forecasts for the automaker’s second-quarter 2026 earnings estimates ahead of this week’s earnings call. Analysts Predict $27 Billion in Revenue On Saturday, the Elon Musk-led automaker announced earnings forecasts...

item.title: Tesla Diner is throwing a birthday party with a Franz-signed special treat
item.description: Tesla is throwing its Hollywood Diner a first birthday party on July 21 and the celebration comes with a guest list of unique items, including a limited run of Tesla Diner birthday hats personally signed by Tesla Chief Designer Franz von Holzhausen for the first 50 customers who place an in-car o...

item.title: Tesla Updates FSD V14 Lite (Update 2026.20.6.10) Release Notes
item.description: Tesla Updates FSD V14 Lite (Update 2026.20.6.10) Release Notes

item.title: TSLA Stock Rises Overnight On Germany Ramp Ahead Of Q2: Analyst Sees 10% Delivery Jump This Year, Improving Margins
item.description: Investors will watch Tesla's updates on margins, cash flow, Cybertruck, FSD 15, and Optimus.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Oil Prices Rise Amid Iran News; Google, Tesla Ahead
item.description: Dow Jones futures: Iran attacks killed three U.S. servicemembers. Google earnings and capex guidance will be key this week.

item.title: Tesla, Alphabet, Intel, GM: Earnings to watch this week
item.description: Asking for a Trend Host Josh Lipton previews several of the biggest stories to come throughout next week, including earnings results out from Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Tesla (TSLA), General Motors (GM), and Intel (INTC).

item.title: Mercedes Benz (XTRA:MBG) Unveils CLA 250 Plus To Take On Tesla Model 3
item.description: Mercedes-Benz Group (XTRA:MBG) has unveiled the revamped CLA 250+, a new luxury electric vehicle. The CLA 250+ is positioned as a direct competitor to Tesla's Model 3 in the premium EV segment. The model features an updated design, extended driving range, and a suite of advanced technologies.

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Remains One of the Last Great Founder-Led Tech Giants. Is the Stock a Buy Before July 22?
item.description: Will Musk's "dogged determination" help Tesla beat expectations?

item.title: Wall Street Brunch: Tesla Reports With Earnings In Full Swing
